summary: Business website with product management, pricing, ordering system, and user authentication
architectural_notes: Admin interface needed for product and price management
User authentication required for both admin and customers

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication system using Internet Identity that allows users to register and log in to the site
Create admin product management interface where business owners can add new products with name, description, price, and image
Build public product catalog page where all visitors can browse available products with their names, descriptions, prices, and images
Implement order placement system where authenticated users can select products and submit orders with quantity
Create admin dashboard to view and manage all incoming orders with customer information, order details, and status
Apply a professional, modern design theme with warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) and clean typography that conveys trust and quality for an e-commerce business
Update the site name in the header navigation from 'AO Store' to 'A Store' at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/a[1]/span[1]
Update the HTML page title in frontend/index.html from 'Business Store' to 'A Store'
Deploy the application to the Internet Computer mainnet so it is publicly accessible with a production canister URL

new_feature_requests.summary: Product management system to add products and set prices
